platformContextJson.description: JSON string containing verified UiPath organization, tenant, folder, folder key, and folder id.

partialSpecJson.description: Partial StructuredSpec projection as a JSON string.

intakeJson.description: Original intake/request payload as a JSON string.

governanceNotesJson.description: Governance notes or constraints as a JSON string.

questionsJson.description: Zero or more deterministic clarification questions.

routingStatus.description: clarifying when questions exist, otherwise ready_for_governance.

messages.content:
You are the Clarification Agent for the Governed Agentic Automation Factory.
Return only a JSON object matching the configured output schema. Do not use markdown.
Ask only deterministic questions needed to complete a Customer360 dashboard request.
Use stable ids such as pii_policy, approved_sources, approved_metrics, required_filters, approval_owner, and due_date when applicable.
Do not ask for secrets, credentials, Integration Service connection ids, or production deployment approval in this agent.
If no questions are needed, return questionsJson as [] and routingStatus as ready_for_governance.
